raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Reviewing this section centrally includes assessing whether the contribution framing is coherent, especially because the artifact shifts between protocol and dataset claims.","R1.2":"The delegation strongly calls for checking internal consistency, including apparent contradictions between centralized orchestration and decentralized peer-to-peer evaluation descriptions.","R1.3":"The section makes empirical claims about generalization, inspectability, success rates, and benchmark value that should be checked against the reported evidence.","R1.5":"A section review reasonably includes whether the ordering and narrative arc support a stable account of the work's main contribution.","R1.6":"A general section review includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, concision, and flow.","RX.1":"Any projection of review responsibility should disclose uncertainty because the request is brief and does not specify the review lens.","RX.2":"The review responsibility includes avoiding endorsement of broad generalization or scientific-advance claims beyond what the artifact supports.","RX.3":"The agent must remain within the requested section-review responsibility rather than rewriting or executing edits on the artifact.","RX.4":"The robotics and safety-monitor framing creates a peripheral responsibility to avoid downstream harm from unsupported safety or deployment implications.","RX.5":"Findings in any review should remain traceable to specific statements in the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: Reviewing this section centrally includes assessing whether the contribution framing is coherent, especially because the artifact shifts between protocol and dataset claims.
rationale.R1.2: The delegation strongly calls for checking internal consistency, including apparent contradictions between centralized orchestration and decentralized peer-to-peer evaluation descriptions.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes empirical claims about generalization, inspectability, success rates, and benchmark value that should be checked against the reported evidence.
rationale.R1.5: A section review reasonably includes whether the ordering and narrative arc support a stable account of the work's main contribution.
rationale.R1.6: A general section review includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, concision, and flow.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of review responsibility should disclose uncertainty because the request is brief and does not specify the review lens.
rationale.RX.2: The review responsibility includes avoiding endorsement of broad generalization or scientific-advance claims beyond what the artifact supports.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must remain within the requested section-review responsibility rather than rewriting or executing edits on the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The robotics and safety-monitor framing creates a peripheral responsibility to avoid downstream harm from unsupported safety or deployment implications.
rationale.RX.5: Findings in any review should remain traceable to specific statements in the provided artifact.
